# Error Patterns

## Silent failure on missing project agents

[Trigger]: When the sync process runs on a project that has no registered agents. [Detail]: The code iterates over agents returned by getProjectAgents() without checking if the array is empty before attempting to process them. Consequence: If the agent list is empty, the loop simply skips, but if the function throws an error or returns undefined in edge cases, the sync might fail silently or crash depending on how the error is handled downstream.

_Source: `src/ingest/sync.js`_

_Tags: `backend`, `testing`_
